prompt: Create a cinematic travel-poster style aerial photograph of Lisbon, Portugal, viewed from an elevated lookout over a historic city center with warm terracotta rooftops, cream and pastel buildings, a broad plaza with patterned black-and-white paving, a tall monument column, tree-lined squares, and distant hills under a vivid blue sky with scattered soft white clouds. Use golden daylight, crisp realistic detail, slight teal-and-orange travel photography color grading, wide landscape composition, and no people emphasized. Overlay elegant white typography centered in the upper-middle sky: the large handwritten brush-script title “Lisbon” with long sweeping strokes, a thin horizontal decorative divider beneath it with a small diamond ornament in the center, and below that an all-caps spaced sans-serif subtitle reading “A CITY OF LIGHT, COLOR AND CHARM” on two lines. Keep the text clean, bright white, balanced, and legible against the sky, like a premium destination postcard or tourism campaign image.
